dimensions.label: Server-known product identities
dimensions.rationale: Union of the frozen 157-product homepage catalog, nine task products, 29 Deals identities, and 20 bounded search-card identities; overlap is deduplicated.

dimensions.label: Products with a meaningful local detail and review destination
dimensions.rationale: Reachability includes explicit sparse evidence-boundary PDPs. It does not imply a rich PDP or a transaction quote.

dimensions.label: Products rendered with rich PDP evidence
dimensions.rationale: Fourteen rich PDPs are separate from the 191 reachable identities and the 49 transaction-ready identities.

dimensions.label: ASINs with at least one complete server-owned quote
dimensions.rationale: Only complete quote allow-list entries can enter cart, Buy Now, checkout, and an order snapshot.

dimensions.label: Products with a source aggregate or explicit zero-review observation
dimensions.rationale: All known products have a local review route, but only these thirteen have source review facts. Local authored reviews never enlarge this denominator.

dimensions.label: Purchasable products with source-backed comparison taxonomy
dimensions.rationale: Eligibility also requires a retained source family; comparison preserves complete selected options and is not equivalent to purchasability.

dimensions.label: Homepage products with direct per-product PDP capture
dimensions.rationale: Eleven direct homepage-to-PDP captures are kept separate from the three matching task-catalog PDPs that complete the fourteen rich local PDPs.

dimensions.label: Frozen route-state-viewport acceptance rows
dimensions.rationale: These are representative mainline states, not a claim that every Amazon page and responsive state was captured.

dimensions.label: Frontend checkpoints with current direct source evidence
dimensions.rationale: Direct source rows remain visible instead of being averaged with partial or inferred frontend states.

dimensions.label: Frontend checkpoints with current partial source evidence
dimensions.rationale: These rows mix direct observations with bounded local states; passing local tests does not upgrade their source evidence.

dimensions.label: Frontend checkpoints whose source semantics are inferred
dimensions.rationale: These local semantics are regression-tested but do not claim direct source capture.

dimensions.label: Scoped frontend checkpoints without source fidelity evidence
dimensions.rationale: Prime Video is intentionally a labeled static placeholder; satisfied means the boundary is honest, not that source fidelity was achieved.

dimensions.label: Scoped current or bounded source asset records
dimensions.rationale: The original 410 base, 10 Deals, 12 Lists, and 20 bounded search-card records stay separate from required runtime aliases.

dimensions.label: Required logical runtime asset paths
dimensions.rationale: The 452 scoped source records plus two separately evidenced runtime aliases close every concrete /static/assets reference used by the candidate.

dimensions.label: P0 success, failure, and recovery journeys
dimensions.rationale: The shopping purpose is incomplete unless all three journey classes remain satisfied.

dimensions.label: P0 local-only asset invariant
dimensions.rationale: The network artifact proves browser/process network closure and required runtime reachability.

dimensions.label: P0 browser journey invariants
dimensions.rationale: The browser artifact proves identity recovery, payment retry, and order/return lifecycle behavior.

dimensions.label: P0 copy-only migration invariant
dimensions.rationale: The migration artifact runs only enumerated legacy schemas in disposable test-owned directories.

dimensions.label: P0 variant identity invariant
dimensions.rationale: The full suite proves complete quote validation and variant identity across stateful surfaces.
